title: Solar-Powered Community Mosque
description: Delivered solar lighting, water harvesting, and worship space upgrades for 450 community members in rural West Africa.
benefit: Energy resilient worship space with sustainable water capture and community education support.

title: Modern Primary School Campus
description: Built a six-classroom primary school with sanitation, clean water, and solar classrooms to support 320 children.
benefit: Increased school attendance and safe learning environments for underserved communities.

title: Clean Water Well Network
description: Installed three clean water wells and sanitation hubs for five villages, reducing waterborne illness and travel time.
benefit: Safe water access for 2,400 people, supporting health and economic recovery.
